overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character in a long coat walking through a snowy mountain canyon at night. The scene features dramatic low lighting from lanterns against a dark blue winter sky, with rocky cliffs and occasional wooden fences lining the path. The character passes another traveler midway through the clip.

tall dark rock formation lining the right side of the canyon wall

snow-covered dirt trail winding through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, snowy canyon at night. The camera follows a character from behind as they walk along a narrow path flanked by tall rocky cliffs. A single lantern post provides warm illumination as the character passes it, continuing toward a distant light visible through the canyon.

events.description: another traveler with a light source appears ahead in the distance
ego character passes the traveler walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing another traveler who is walking toward the camera with a light source

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera carrying a lantern, passes by the ego character on the left

entered.detail: faint warm light visible through the canyon ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the canyon, another traveler appears in the distance carrying a light. The two figures approach each other in the narrow passage, passing closely before continuing on their separate paths. The rocky cliffs remain prominent on both sides.

events.description: wooden fence becomes visible along the right side of the path
approaching a series of lantern posts illuminating the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding canyon path as the landscape opens slightly and wooden fences appear

entered.detail: wooden post and rail fence running along the right edge of the path
multiple lantern posts lining the path ahead providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking alone again through the canyon as the path curves gently. Wooden fences appear along the right side, replacing the sheer rock face. The character approaches a series of lantern posts that light the way forward through the snowy mountain trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, snowy canyon that transitions from a solitary journey into a brief encounter with another traveler. It begins by trailing a character from behind as they navigate a narrow path flanked by towering rocky cliffs under a night sky. As the character passes a single lantern post that casts a warm glow against the cold surroundings, the camera maintains its forward momentum toward a distant light. The scene then shifts as another traveler carrying a light emerges from the gloom, leading to a close passing between the two figures within the confines of the rocky passage. Finally, the camera continues to follow the protagonist as they move away from the encounter and deeper into the canyon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain canyon as the rugged terrain transitions into a guided path. It begins with the character walking alone through the narrow canyon, where the camera tracks their steady progress along a gently curving trail. As the path winds forward, the sheer rock faces on the right gradually give way to a series of rustic wooden fences. The scene then shifts toward a sequence of glowing lantern posts that emerge from the darkness to illuminate the snowy ground. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the mountain pass, guided by the warm light of the lanterns against the cold winter night.
